message:
fix(frame): format bool groupby key labels as pandas-style "True"/"False"

Bool group keys previously fell through to the Rust Debug formatter,
producing "Bool(true)"/"Bool(false)" as index labels. Add explicit
Scalar::Bool match arm that formats as "True"/"False" to match pandas
behavior exactly.

New test dataframe_groupby_bool_key_labels_are_pandas_style validates
index labels are ["True", "False"] and summed values are correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
